name: Silver Buffalo Sanrio Hello Kitty x Nissin Cup Noodles 20-Ounce Ramen Bowl and Chopstick Set
description: Enjoy your favorite soup or noodles in style with this fun Sanrio Hello Kitty ramen bowl set! Fun and functional, this ramen bowl set is great for using around the house, at parties, and more! Officially licensed. Produced by Silver Buffalo, a trendsetting housewares and home decor company based in the heart of New York City.
